questions.question: Explain the ACID properties of database transactions.
expectedPoints: Atomicity: All operations succeed or all fail
Consistency: Database remains consistent before and after
Isolation: Transactions don't interfere with each other
Durability: Committed changes persist after failures

questions.question: Describe the steps to implement transaction processing in JDBC with proper error handling.
expectedPoints: Execute SQL operations within try block
Rollback transaction in catch block if exceptions occur
Use finally block to restore auto-commit and close resources
Handle SQL exceptions appropriately at each step
